name: homebridge-devialet-phantom
description: Homebridge plugin that controls a Devialet Phantom (I/II, single or stereo pair) via its local HTTP IP Control API and exposes it in Apple Home as a Television accessory.

scripts.lint: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/platform.js && node --check src/platformAccessory.js && node --check src/devialetClient.js && node --check src/settings.js
